description: TechBuddy for GenLink Hacks 2026 (MVP) — scam check, AI chat, practice, phone help, quick tips; seniors-first; demo on deployed HTTPS URL

userStories.title: Scam check API returns structured JSON server-side only
userStories.description: As a developer, I need POST /api/scam-check to call Z.ai on the server and return a typed scam result so the client never sees API keys.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/scam-check accepts JSON body with non-empty message string
Response JSON includes verdict SCAM|SAFE|SUSPICIOUS, headline, explanation; may include warning_signs, action_steps, already_clicked arrays or strings per app types
Z_AI_API_KEY or ZAI_API_KEY is read only in server route or lib used by route, not in client components
Assistant text from model is normalized (e.g. empty content + reasoning_content handled) before JSON parse
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: AI chat API streams SSE from server
userStories.description: As a developer, I need POST /api/ai-chat to stream assistant tokens so What Is AI can show answers progressively without exposing secrets.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/ai-chat accepts messages array with user/assistant roles and string content
Response Content-Type is text/event-stream (or equivalent SSE) and emits JSON chunks the client already parses (e.g. data: {"text":"..."})
System prompt for explainer is applied server-side (ELI5, no fear-mongering, no medical/legal/financial advice)
On misconfiguration, returns 503 with JSON error, not a crash
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Practice API returns reply and phase
userStories.description: As a developer, I need POST /api/practice to return roleplay or debrief phase with assistant text so Practice Mode can advance safely.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/practice accepts scenario string, messages array, and phase roleplay|debrief
Response JSON has string reply and phase roleplay|debrief
Uses server-side model only; no API keys in client bundle
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Phone Help topics, steps, images, and walkthrough UI
userStories.description: As an older adult, I want topic list and step-by-step screens with images so I can follow phone tasks on my device.
acceptanceCriteria: Topics and steps are defined in a single module (e.g. lib/phone-help.ts) with predictable image paths /phone-help/{slug}-{step}.png
/phone-help lists topics; /phone-help/[topic] shows linear steps with next/back (or equivalent) usable at ~375px width
Each step shows instruction text and img with non-empty alt text
Placeholder images exist in public/phone-help for each referenced path or documented fallback
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Quick Tips one tip per day without AI
userStories.description: As an older adult, I want one short tip per visit based on the date so I learn something without starting a chat.
acceptanceCriteria: /quick-tips shows exactly one tip per load
Tip source is static or pre-authored list (no live AI call for MVP)
Tip typography uses large readable body text consistent with design tokens
Implementation documents whether tip is date-based or deterministic rotation
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Manifest and optional production extras
userStories.description: As center staff, I want installable web app metadata and optional rate limiting/analytics so tablets and ops behave safely.
acceptanceCriteria: App Router serves a web manifest (e.g. app/manifest.ts) with name TechBuddy, short_name, start_url /, display standalone, theme_color and background_color matching design tokens
Optional: Upstash rate limiting in Node API routes when UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL and UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_TOKEN are set; when unset, POST APIs still return 200 for valid requests
Optional: Plausible script in root layout only when NEXT_PUBLIC_PLAUSIBLE_DOMAIN is set
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Page shell, header, home menu, Privacy, For centers
userStories.description: As an older adult, I want a clear home menu and trust pages linked from every screen so I can navigate and understand data use.
acceptanceCriteria: PageShell wraps main app pages; SiteHeader includes Home link and Privacy and For centers when not in kiosk mode (?kiosk=1 hides non-Home header links per spec)
Home route lists five areas: Scam, Phone Help, What Is AI, Practice, Quick Tips with min-height tap targets >= 56px equivalent
/privacy states no accounts, messages go to server then AI for scam/AI chat/practice, no selling data, who to ask
/for-centers includes Print control and print-friendly layout; explains five areas
User can reach Home from major flows via header without relying only on browser back
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Scam checker page UI
userStories.description: As an older adult, I want to paste suspicious text and see a clear verdict with first action highlighted and read-aloud.
acceptanceCriteria: /scam-checker uses ScamCheckerForm to POST message to /api/scam-check and renders structured result
When action_steps exist, first step is shown in a prominent Do this first (or equivalent) region and not duplicated in the remaining list
Plain-language errors and Try again; user message not cleared on failure before retry where applicable
Read aloud control covers verdict headline, explanation, warnings, actions, already_clicked
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: What Is AI chat UI
userStories.description: As an older adult, I want starter questions and streaming replies with limits and friendly errors.
acceptanceCriteria: /what-is-ai renders AIChatPanel with suggested starters and text input
Replies stream into chat bubbles with readable font sizes
Turn limit reached shows clear message; Start over resets state
On fetch/stream error, friendly copy plus Try again; restore last question in input when applicable
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Practice Mode list and session UI
userStories.description: As an older adult, I want to pick a scenario, see that the other party is simulated, chat, end early, and read a debrief.
acceptanceCriteria: /practice lists scenarios; /practice/[scenario] starts session with clear not a real person messaging
User can send messages; assistant replies via /api/practice; debrief phase shows debrief content
End Practice (or STOP PRACTICE) reaches debrief without dead-end
API errors show clear message and Try again on setup; roleplay can dismiss error and resend
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Deployment and PRD demo script on production URL
userStories.description: As a hackathon team member, I want a stable HTTPS deployment and a passing demo script so judges can try the app.
acceptanceCriteria: npm run build exits 0 with no errors
App deployed to stable HTTPS URL (e.g. Vercel); .env.example documents required vars; no secrets committed
On deployed URL: complete PRD section 9 demo script steps 1-8 (home, scam, AI, practice, phone help, quick tips, privacy, for-centers print preview)
Browser devtools or network tab shows no API keys in client-loaded JS
Typecheck passes
